cards.english: Peppa and George are now going to playgroup.

cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 hai6 dai6 jat1 ci3 faan1 zaa3
cards.english: Today is George's first time going.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George，你期待今日返幼兒班嗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 kei4 doi6 gam1 jat6 faan1 jau3 ji4 baan1 maa1
cards.english: George, are you excited to go to playgroup today?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋，我覺得George佢太細 唔應該返我嘅幼兒班啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 gok3 dak1 keoi5 taai3 sai3 m4 jing1 goi1 faan1 ngo5 ge3 jau3 ji4 baan1 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, I think George is too young. He shouldn't be in my playgroup.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: mou5 man6 tai4 gaa4

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 因為有你仲有恐龍先生陪住佢吖嗎
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 jau5 nei5 zung6 jau5 hung2 lung4 sin1 saang1 pui4 zyu6 keoi5 aa1 maa1
cards.english: Because you and Mr. Dinosaur will be with him.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係我想同啲大啲嘅同學玩啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 soeng2 tung4 di1 daai6 di1 ge3 tung4 hok6 waan2 aa3
cards.english: But I want to play with the older classmates.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔係同George仲有佢嘅恐龍玩具玩啊
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 tung4 zung6 jau5 keoi5 ge3 hung2 lung4 wun6 geoi6 waan2 aa3
cards.english: Not with George and his dinosaur toy?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 弊喇，Peppa唔想George返佢幼兒班喎
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 m4 soeng2 faan1 keoi5 jau3 ji4 baan1 wo3
cards.english: Oh dear, Peppa doesn't want George to come to her playgroup.

cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 nei5 hang2 ding6 zan1 hai6 jiu3 jat1 cai4 lai4
cards.english: Daddy, are you sure George really needs to come along?

cards.jyutping: wai6 keoi5 ge3 sai3 lou2 ji4 gam2 dou3 zi6 hou4 aa3
cards.english: Peppa is proud of her little brother.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau6 wai6 si6 faan6 haa6 dim2 joeng2 waak6 waa2 laa1

cards.jyutping: waak6 waa2 m4 hai6 gam3 hou2 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: George isn't very good at drawing.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 噉不如有你試下幫佢吖
cards.jyutping: gam2 bat1 jyu4 jau5 nei5 si3 haa6 bong1 keoi5 aa1
cards.english: Then why don't you try helping him?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 ngo5 waak6 waa2 hou2 lek1 aa3
cards.english: Okay, I'm very good at drawing!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我會教佢點樣畫一朵花㗎！
cards.jyutping: ngo5 wui6 gaau3 keoi5 dim2 joeng2 waa2 jat1 do2 faa1 gaa4
cards.english: I'm going to teach him how to draw a flower!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gam1 jat6 zeon2 bei6 gaau3 nei5 waak6 waa2
cards.english: George, today I'm going to teach you how to draw.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 dim2 joeng2 waa2 jat1 do2 faa1
cards.english: Specifically, how to draw a flower.

cards.characters: Peppa，你有個咁叻嘅細佬 一定好自豪㗎嘞
cards.jyutping: nei5 jau5 go3 gam3 lek1 ge3 sai3 lou2 jat1 ding6 hou2 zi6 hou4 gaa4 laak3

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E6 The Playgroup［幼兒班］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 班細路嘅父母嚟接佢哋放學

cards.jyutping: haa6 ci3 zung6 ho2 ji5 lai4 maa1

cards.characters: 可以，佢下次仲可以畫多幅靚畫𠻹㗎
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 keoi5 haa6 ci3 zung6 ho2 ji5 waak6 do1 fuk1 leng3 waak6 tim1 gaa4

cards.english: So what will you draw next time? Tell me.
